name: lists
description: Manage lists — create a new list, archive all cards in list, move all cards in list. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

parameters.name: idBoard
parameters.description: The long ID of the board the list should be created on

parameters.name: idListSource
parameters.description: ID of the List to copy into the new List

parameters.name: pos
parameters.description: Position of the list. `top`, `bottom`, or a positive floating point number
